archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury (with Archetype 1 Organic & Earthy influences)
emotional_tone: Premium quality, trust, luxury, craftsmanship, attention to detail, professionalism, design excellence.

colors.primary_description: Obsidian Black - Used for high-impact contrasting sections, footer, and elegant typography.
colors.secondary_description: Graphite - Used for subtle dark card backgrounds or secondary dark sections.
colors.background_description: Warm Ivory - The dominant base background. Creates an organic, airy, editorial feel.
colors.surface_description: Stone - Used for light card backgrounds, borders, or alternating sections.
colors.accent_primary_description: Champagne Gold - Used sparingly for key call-to-actions, fine architectural lines, and hover states.
colors.accent_secondary_description: Walnut Brown - Used for textural depth, typography accents, and organic warmth.
colors.success_description: Sage Green - Used for success states in the consultation form and organic accents.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-tight
rules.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-snug

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Editorial, magazine-like layouts. Heavy reliance on negative space and asymmetrical grids to convey luxury.

grid_modes.portfolio: Bento 'Tetris' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12 with varied row spans for an asymmetrical, curated gallery look.

spacing_and_layout.borders: Fine 1px solid lines (#E6E0D8 or rgba(11,11,13,0.1)) used structurally to mimic architectural blueprints.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B0B0D] text-[#F7F5F2] hover:bg-[#1B1D22] transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-wide uppercase
buttons.secondary: border border-[#0B0B0D] text-[#0B0B0D] hover:bg-[#0B0B0D] hover:text-[#F7F5F2] transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-wide uppercase
buttons.accent: bg-[#C9A86A] text-[#0B0B0D] hover:bg-[#b5955a] transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 font-medium text-sm tracking-wide uppercase

cards.style: Flat, zero border-radius (or absolute max 2px). No heavy drop shadows. Rely on 1px borders and high-quality imagery.

forms.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-[#0B0B0D]/20 focus:border-[#C9A86A] outline-none py-3 text-lg transition-colors rounded-none w-full

navigation.style: Glassmorphism avoided for luxury. Use solid or semi-solid bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md with fine bottom border. Sticky top z-50.

animations.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling mandatory for a premium 'heavy' momentum feel.
animations.transitions: Framer motion for subtle fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1) and slow image scales (1.1 to 1.0) on scroll.
animations.hover_effects: Image zoom on hover (overflow-hidden wrapper, scale-105 on image), text underline reveal for links.
animations.parallax: Use scroll-triggered parallax for large hero images and overlapping architectural elements.

hero_home.description: Lavish modern living area, perfect for the main home hero background.

portfolio_commercial.description: Illuminated office inside modern glass building.

textures.description: Stone/brick architectural texture for background accents.

pages.Home: Cinematic hero (Obsidian Black text over light ivory or full image overlay max bg-black/40). Featured projects using asymmetrical grid. Service overview. Testimonials slider. Magazine-style layout.
pages.Portfolio: Filterable gallery. 'Tetris' grid layout. Large images, generous spacing.
pages.Services: Detailed service pages. Alternating text/image blocks. High reliance on large typography and Stone (#E6E0D8) background blocks.
pages.Consultation: Multi-step animated form using Framer Motion. Progress indicator. Clean, minimal, distraction-free.
pages.Admin: Dashboard using Shadcn UI. Strictly functional, Obsidian Black sidebar, Warm Ivory main area.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use `lenis` for smooth scrolling.
Install and use `framer-motion` for page transitions, fade-ins, and scroll parallax.
Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Never use raw CSS unless absolutely necessary.
For the multi-step form, use React state + framer-motion to slide between steps.
DO NOT use generic Shadcn cards for marketing pages. Build custom HTML/Tailwind structures with 0px border radius and fine 1px borders.
Use Shadcn UI strictly for the Admin panel and complex form elements (like Select, Dialog).
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="consultation-submit-btn"`).
The Hero overlay should never be fully black. Use `bg-black/30` or `bg-white/20` gradient overlays to keep the luxury image visible.
